posts.name: Clera
posts.tagline: An AI agent matching candidates to the right roles.
posts.description: Meet Clera: your AI talent agent for finding roles you actually want. Clera gets to know what you’re looking for over iMessage and WhatsApp. It surfaces roles you’d actually be excited by and makes direct intros to relevant companies. You hear about good opportunities without spending hours searching and applying.

posts.name: SureThing.io
posts.tagline: Autonomous agent that communicates results like a human
posts.description: Everyone's running AI agents. Seldom hitting their business goals. AI isn't the bottleneck anymore. Humans are. SureThing is a General AI Agency. Paste any GitHub skill — it becomes a team you can @ anytime. One persistent memory across your COO, CMO, and CTO — zero silos. Agents that report up like humans. So you can finally run it like a CEO, not a debugger. With SureThing, now hit your business goals at inference speed.

posts.name: Social Fetch
posts.tagline: Pull real-time data from any social platform via API.
posts.description: One API for public social data. Scrape profiles, posts, comments, videos, and transcripts from TikTok, Instagram, YouTube, X (Twitter), LinkedIn and Facebook. Pay-as-you-go credits, no rate limits, 100 free credits, no card required.

posts.name: Lovable mobile app
posts.tagline: Your ideas don't wait for you to sit down at a desk
posts.description: Lovable is an Al software builder that turns your idea into working websites or web apps. No code required. Create tools and websites fast using natural language. Whether you're a founder, vibe coder or developer, Lovable enables you to ship apps quickly without coding knowledge.

posts.name: Actian VectorAI DB
posts.tagline: The portable vector database for AI agents beyond the cloud
posts.description: Actian VectorAI DB is a portable vector database built for AI beyond the cloud. Developers can store, retrieve, and reason over data locally, delivering low-latency vector search on embedded, edge, on-prem, and hybrid systems - with a 22x QPS advantage over Milvus and Qdrant at 10M vectors. Build once, deploy consistently, without relying on cloud-native infrastructure. Teams maintain full data ownership and predictable behavior across edge, on-prem, hybrid, and cloud environments.

posts.name: The Agentic Sales Engine by Crono
posts.tagline: Where sales teams and AI agents work side by side.
posts.description: Most sales tools help you manage pipeline. Crono helps you execute it. We’re introducing the Agentic Sales Engine: a new way to run sales where AI agents and humans work side by side. Crono unifies signals, data, and workflows into one execution layer. Instead of manual tasks, prospecting, enrichment, and outreach become coordinated workflows. Teams act on real-time signals, not guesswork, turning execution into revenue.

posts.name: WUPHF by Nex.ai
posts.tagline: AI employees who build their own knowledge base
posts.description: WUPHF is a collaborative office of AI employees who build and maintain their own knowledge base to never lose context for the tasks you give them. Supports Claude Code, Codex, OpenClaw agents and local LLMs via OpenCode. Chat with your agents via TUI, Web or Telegram. Open source. Runs on your machine, with your keys.

posts.name: OrcaSheets AI Reports
posts.tagline: Query data to build dashboards and generate detailed reports
posts.description: OrcaSheets AI Reports lets you query your data to build dashboards and generate detailed reports. One prompt gives you an executive summary, KPIs, insights and recommendations, ready to share in seconds. Stop building reports manually.

posts.name: Famnest

posts.description: Privacy-first family organizer app to manage schedules, health, bills, and more in one place. Built for modern families.

posts.name: SimCam

posts.description: SimCam lets you test camera features without a physical device - stream from your Mac's built-in or external camera, inject an image, or generate a QR code. Includes a CLI letting agents control the camera on iOS simulator.

posts.name: MaxHermes by Minimax

posts.description: MaxHermes is a cloud sandbox AI agent that autonomously extracts reusable skills from completed tasks and improves itself across sessions. For knowledge workers and enterprise teams who want an AI assistant that compounds with use.

posts.name: Colir

posts.description: Sculpt non-linear gradients with curve-based control on X/Y axes. Real-time WebGL rendering, 12 blend modes, and effects (noise, sparkle, feather, distortion). PNG/WebP export, free + paid tiers.

posts.name: Curflow
posts.tagline: Draw a gesture for your Mac to execute
posts.description: Right-click + drag to close a tab. Flick down to minimize. Swipe left to go back. Works everywhere — Finder, Safari, Slack, Xcode, any app. For trackpad users: create custom gestures beyond what macOS gives you. For mouse users: full gesture control on any mouse, like the Apple Magic Mouse experience without the Magic Mouse. 14-day free trial, lifetime license.

posts.name: Voice Agents
posts.tagline: Turn expertise into 24/7 client-facing AI voice agents
posts.description: Build client-facing voice agents trained on your expertise. Let clients ask questions, practice conversations, and get support by speaking — then switch back to chat anytime.

posts.name: Blueprint
posts.tagline: One-shot bigger coding tasks
posts.description: Coding agents guess too much. On ambiguous tasks, they rush to code or invent a plan that sounds right and misses what you actually wanted. Blueprint reads your code, asks grounded questions that matter, and hands any agent a plan worth executing. The hope is that Blueprint catches what you didn't think to think about. The result is a plan your agent can execute in one shot. Free, open source, and available as agent skills or extensions in Cursor, Windsurf, VS Code.

posts.name: Jitera

AIRS ML creates edge AI devices that mount onto any asset — CNC machines, robotic arms, motors, spindles, pumps — and detects incipient faults weeks before failure. Runs entirely on-device at 100 kHz, air-gapped, no cloud required. Validated across assets and John Deere startup collaborator 2026.

Zibra removes that bottleneck — over 97% in size reduction, 600+ GB/s decompression, delivered in the compressed unified format directly into GPU. 40% better GPU utilization. 30% faster model convergence. This is the missing data layer.

posts.description: Introducing Athena Pro: Our GitHub connector analyzes your codebase to generate blindspot and risk reports across API and DB layers-spotting what breaks before you build. The document connector lets you upload PDFs, turning scattered info into a structured knowledge base your AI agents can reason on. Stop working from prompts. Athena Pro uses your real product context to deliver decision-ready insights.

posts.name: LytteAI

posts.description: LytteAI is building human-grade financial AI agents. More details at lytte.ai.

posts.description: Build a personalized gym program around your goals, schedule, and equipment - with technique guidance, progress tracking, and automatic progression.

posts.name: ADIN.AI

posts.description: ADIN.AI is an AI-native marketing platform combining analytics (SEE) and campaign management (MANAGE). Customers include L'Oréal, Vodafone, Under Armour, Prada, Publicis. Up-to-5x RoAS claims.

posts.name: Slop'o'Meter
posts.tagline: How much of their LinkedIn is AI slop?
posts.description: Paste a LinkedIn profile and we'll grade their last ten posts on the SlopScale™ - from soulless ChatGPT goo to suspiciously authentic human. Benchmark your score with industry leaders and checkout your company profile for an overall rating!

posts.name: Nexus UI
posts.tagline: Beautiful, composable components for building AI apps
posts.description: Open-source component library for building AI-native applications. Beautiful, composable primitives for chat, streaming, and multimodal experiences.

posts.name: rHub CRM
posts.tagline: Affordable CRM with automations and free lead finder
posts.description: rHub is a powerful yet simple CRM for growing teams. Manage deals, contacts, and emails in one place. From only $9 a month with many apps, integrations and automations. Start free today

posts.name: Meridian
posts.tagline: See the time of day across the world in color
posts.description: Meridian replaces your Chrome new tab with beautiful full-height gradient columns that shift color based on the time of day in each timezone. Track up to 10 zones at a glance. Dawn peach in Tokyo, midnight navy in New York, golden afternoon in London. All on one screen. Completely free, no accounts, no backend, no ads. Your data stays in your browser.

posts.name: Peekd
posts.tagline: Turn an article quote into a shareable image in 2 clicks.
posts.description: Capture a quote from any article with the Peekd Chrome extension and turn it into a styled, shareable image. Pick your snippet and download a polished image ready for social media.

posts.name: CloakScan
posts.tagline: Detect SEO cloaking: see Googlebot vs user content
posts.description: CloakScan detects when a website shows different content to search engines vs real users — a practice called cloaking that can destroy your rankings overnight. Paste any URL and instantly compare what Googlebot sees vs what real visitors see, with a 0–100 risk score. ✓ No plugins or server access required ✓ Side-by-side content diff (bot vs user) ✓ Scheduled monitoring with email alerts ✓ Full audit trail for client reporting ✓ Free to use — no account required

posts.name: RAFT Energy
posts.tagline: Turbocharge biogas plants with patented activated biochar
posts.description: Biogas plants run well below their potential — not bad infrastructure, just unsolved biology. ActiCH4R™ fixes that. Raft Energy's patented biochar additive supercharges microbial activity inside digesters. Same waste, significantly more methane. Up to 10x more efficient than anything on the market. No new infrastructure needed. Started in a garden shed, now scaling globally. Founding team: 9 exits, a decade in renewables.

posts.name: LLC Formation Tool
posts.tagline: Find your best LLC setup in 2 minutes
posts.description: Most LLC guides give the same generic advice. This tool asks 5 questions about your specific situation and gives you: your best state (with reasons), a side-by-side comparison of 8 formation services, a full cost breakdown, and a personalized step-by-step roadmap. Free. No signup. No email required. Built for solopreneurs, freelancers, and foreign nationals forming a US LLC.

posts.name: Zeeh
posts.tagline: Open Banking for all
posts.description: Zeeh is an AI-powered no-code open banking API suite for African fintechs: identity verification (KYC), financial data (Connect), credit history (Insights), and direct debit payments. AWS Fintech Accelerator finalist; named Fastest-Growing Open Banking API in Nigeria (2022).

posts.name: ShutterCount.org
posts.tagline: Check any camera's shutter count in your browser
posts.description: Drop any JPEG or RAW file from your camera and instantly see the shutter actuation count, wear status vs. manufacturer-rated life, and full EXIF metadata — focal length, lens, ISO, aperture, and more. Works with Nikon, Sony, Canon, Fujifilm, Pentax, and Ricoh. Everything is parsed in your browser using JavaScript. Your files never leave your device.

posts.name: frelvo
posts.tagline: Client portal for the rest of the world
posts.description: Freelancers outside the US are often blocked from using client portals like HoneyBook or Dubsado due to banking restrictions. Frelvo is a client portal built for the rest of the world. Branded client logins, invoicing, contracts, e-signatures, messaging, and file sharing — all in one place. Works in 135+ countries via Stripe Connect. $15/mo Pro with a genuinely useful free tier. Built solo by a Filipino engineer in Spain. My second product.

posts.name: Rusty Browser
posts.tagline: Spawn Zero Code AI Browser Agents Infinitely
posts.description: Rusty Browser is the most efficient, hybrid AI Browser Agent in the market. Affordably scale infinite number of AI Agents for your browser based workflows without breaking the bank.

posts.name: BoardSnap
posts.tagline: The AI whiteboard app for the iPhone in your pocket.
posts.description: Snap any whiteboard — classroom, boardroom, coffee-shop napkin. BoardSnap straightens it, reads every line (handwriting, diagrams, arrows), and returns a crisp summary plus tappable action items in 10 seconds. Each board lives in a Project that learns your brand from your website, so summaries sound like your company — not a generic chatbot. Project-scoped AI chat that remembers every board you've ever shot. Pinned context. Offline-safe queue. iPhone-first.

posts.name: Treasury
posts.tagline: Ask your money anything
posts.description: Managing your money shouldn't be this hard. Most finance apps hand you a dashboard and walk away. Treasury is the AI financial assistant that understands your whole financial life, your accounts, goals, and context, and helps you make the most of every dollar.

posts.name: Kitopus
posts.tagline: Your SaaS monitored and operated by an AI agent
posts.description: Kitopus is an AI agent that monitors your SaaS and takes action automatically. It tracks metrics, detects issues, and sends lifecycle emails like winbacks, trial reminders, and payment alerts. Instead of checking dashboards, you get insights and actions directly on Telegram. Set it once — it runs your SaaS for you.

posts.name: Sorair Technologies
posts.tagline: Unlocking autonomy in drone operations
posts.description: Sorair offers Soranet, a drone automation platform with BVLOS capabilities, central control room, and regulatory compliance. Backed by Techstars, ESA, Haatch VC, Pi Labs; partnered with DJI Enterprise.

posts.name: Retrocodex
posts.tagline: Fix outdated parts of your education and unlearn myths.
posts.description: Many things you've been taught in school or everyday life is now outdated or was always a myth, like "you only use 10% of your brain". Retrocodex is a platform that documents common misconceptions and outdated information submitted by users from all over the world. What you learned often depends on where you're from, so follow other users who grew up in the same state or country as you to discover what your part of the world got wrong!

posts.tagline: Read aloud pages, PDFs, and selections with word highlights

Word highlighting tracks the current word so it's easy to follow along while reading visually. Save anything you want to hear later (articles, PDFs, LLM responses, pasted notes) into a queue and play through it like a podcast.

posts.name: BluumBio

posts.name: Scribefully

Built for reliability with adaptive chunking, missing-chunk recovery, SHA-256 integrity checks, and clear retry states. Works on desktop and mobile.

Track OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, Mistral, xAI, and Meta — all in one place.

What it does: • Voice → structured tasks • Auto organization • Calendar integration • Easy sharing via link Built for fast thinkers who don’t want to lose momentum.

posts.name: StealthFlights

With access to multiple leading AI models and a built-in editor, Ella lets you go from idea to finished video in one seamless workspace.

Zero per-repo config. Connect a read-only token and Riftmap discovers everything from your actual code. Get instant impact analysis: see downstream blast radius, find who consumes your shared modules, and stop losing critical knowledge when engineers leave. Built for teams managing 30–500+ repos.

By introducing our new Gmail Agent and an enhanced Chatbot experience, Montty now proactively finds and organizes your financial data so you don’t have to. We are building toward a world of "Passive FinOps," where automated, intelligent systems replace your workload and stress.

posts.name: Sonary Booster

posts.description: Managing software shouldn't be a chore. Sonary Booster is our new, 100% free command center built to help you audit and optimize your entire tech stack in one place. Stop overpaying.

posts.name: NEXTURN
posts.tagline: Find your next game in 3 minutes by swiping
posts.description: NEXTURN is a swipe-based game discovery tool. Drag titles into 3 zones — love, interested, not for me — and a recommendation engine learns your taste, then suggests what to play next. Powered by IGDB across ~1200 curated titles + a global pool fallback. Free, no signup, no ads. JP/EN supported.

posts.name: Forsico

Move from passive monitoring to autonomous execution

posts.name: RiotSchool
posts.tagline: Everything school skipped. Finally taught.
posts.description: RiotSchool teaches the real-world skills school skipped: money, mindset, work, the internet, and decisions. 25 lessons across 5 pillars. Each one ends in a "cheatcode" — a one-line takeaway you'll actually remember. Built mobile-first as a PWA, free, no signup, four languages. Built originally for the people who got the least of this in school. But most adults realise pretty quickly they didn't learn this stuff either. Finally taught the way it should have been.

posts.name: Mira
posts.tagline: See how fast your body is actually aging
posts.description: How old is your body actually behaving? Mira reads your HealthKit data (sleep, HRV, heart rate, steps) and gives you one number back: your biological age. Every Monday, a fresh reveal. Sometimes younger than your birthday. Sometimes older. Either way, you finally know. Mira's insight engine, reads your personal patterns and tells you what's moving your number. Specific to you. Not generic advice. Free to try on iOS. Premium for deeper insights. Stays on your phone.

posts.name: HostAd

posts.description: HostAd turns indoor screens at cafés, barbershops & coworkings into a programmatic ad network. Ukrainian SMBs target customers within 1 km of their store — self-serve, from $8/month, with built-in QR attribution. No agency, no phone calls, no spreadsheets.

posts.name: TAYP
posts.tagline: Post highlights. Get seen. Build your name.
posts.description: Tayp is a sports highlight platform where athletes post videos, build their profile, and get real exposure. Tayp fixes that. • Post highlights in a feed built for sports • Build a profile coaches can evaluate • Get discovered by athletes, fans, and recruiters If you’re not seen, you don’t exist. Tayp makes sure you are.

posts.name: FitPal+
posts.tagline: Your AI workout coach — train smarter, not harder
posts.description: Most fitness apps ignore how you actually feel. FitPal+ is different. Tell the AI Coach your energy level — Great, Good, Tired, or Sore — and it automatically adjusts your weights (+10% to -30%) so you train at the right intensity every session. Built solo while driving Uber. Features: mood-based AI coaching, 120+ exercises, workout templates, Apple Health sync, and one-tap template sharing with friends. Free to download. Train smarter, not just harder.

posts.name: MemoMed 2.0
posts.tagline: A calm, private medication tracker — no accounts, no cloud
posts.description: MemoMed is an offline-first medication tracker. Encrypted local DB, no accounts, no cloud sync. Drug-interaction warnings stay free forever. Pro adds the adherence dashboard, doctor-ready PDF, and home-screen widget. Android first; iOS coming.

posts.name: h2oMatch
posts.tagline: Find the mineral waters that fit you
posts.description: h2oMatch helps you understand mineral waters using official label data such as sodium, calcium, magnesium, bicarbonate and fixed residue. You can search for a specific water, compare waters side by side, use the Water Calculator to filter by mineral preferences, and get personalized matches based on your lifestyle and taste preferences. It is designed to make water labels easier to understand and mineral water choices more transparent. Not all water is equal! Find the ones that fit you best!

posts.name: Crema
posts.tagline: The coffee bag journal that learns your grind.
posts.description: Crema is a small, beautifully-opinionated espresso journal. Photograph a new coffee bag and on-device OCR extracts the details. Track each dial-in attempt — dose, yield, time, grind, taste, texture — and rate the drinks you make (espresso, cortado, iced latte, cappuccino, or your own). As your history grows, Crema suggests starting grind settings for new bags based on your own ratings on similar roasts and learns your profile taste and spend. No app store, no account wall, no tracking, no ads.

posts.name: Raid
posts.tagline: Open-source development workflow orchestrator
posts.description: Raid is a CLI that handles your local development workflows so you can focus on making software instead of fighting it. Builds can break when pulling master. Setup steps live in Slack and stale wikis. Raid codifies your entire workflow in a simple YAML profile — testing, patching, environment setup — as a single source of truth for every engineer on the team. Open source. Built in Go. AI-first features coming soon.

posts.name: PhoneCane
posts.tagline: Anonymous voice calls with strangers No account. No history.
posts.description: PhoneCane connects you with a random stranger by voice instantly. No signup, no account, no recordings — ever. Audio is peer-to-peer via WebRTC so it never touches our servers. We literally cannot record you. Also features Party Calls (up to 10 people via room code) and a Voice Board where you leave anonymous 30-second audio messages for the world. Works in Safari or Chrome. No app download needed.

posts.name: Chrome Extension
posts.tagline: Full-page screenshots with annotations — one click, no fuss
posts.description: Most screenshot tools only capture the visible area, need a desktop app, or are buried in DevTools. SnapShot captures the full page instantly and opens a built-in annotation editor — right in your browser. → Full-page capture (Chrome debugger API, pixel-perfect) → Annotate with arrows, shapes & text → Copy or download as PNG → 100% local — no installs, no accounts, no data sent anywhere

posts.name: Renda

posts.description: Renda turns Claude Design HTML exports into clean, perfectly-sized PNGs for Instagram and Twitter. Drop in the zip, pick a size, get ready-to-post images in seconds. Refine with chat ("remove the pip dots"). 10 free renders/month. No credit card.

Before events, review the attendee list and read back through each person's history and refresh your memory so you never seem like you forgot. After, journal how it actually went. Set reminders to nudge you when close people go quiet. No account. No cloud. Everything stays on your phone.

posts.name: Pinghawk — Know Why APIs Break
posts.tagline: See exactly what happened at the moment your API failed
posts.description: When your API fails, Pinghawk shows exactly what happened — at the moment it failed. Instead of a generic “API is down” alert, it records DNS, TLS, TTFB, and the response body — so you know why it failed, not just that it failed. It captures multiple snapshots across failures and catches silent issues like cron jobs and SSL expiry. Free during beta — would love your feedback if this solves a real pain for you.

posts.name: Planted: Journal & Reminders
posts.tagline: Nice plant journal app with watering reminders.

posts.name: Pour
posts.tagline: One confident wine pick for whatever you're eating
posts.description: Pour scans your restaurant wine list a from photo and tells you exactly which wine to order for your dish. Not a list of peer reviewed options. One call, with a short reason why it works, what to avoid, and where the value is on the list. Built for people who feel uncertain when the wine list arrives. Free, no sign-up, works from your phone at the table.

posts.name: LeadVault
posts.tagline: Agentic AI platform for intent‑first, verified B2B leads
posts.description: LeadVault is an agentic AI system that finds real B2B demand, not cold contacts. It scans 3,000+ public platforms — LinkedIn, RFP boards, Upwork, Fiverr, Bark, government tenders — for companies that have already posted requirements. Every lead then passes through a 7‑layer AI + human verification pipeline: email validation, decision‑maker scoring, ICP matching, and budget/scope extraction. Output: CRM‑ready, 100% verified leads delivered in 48 hours.

posts.name: ResuMog
posts.tagline: Turn a messy resume into a job-ready one in minutes.
posts.description: Most resume builders just help you write one. ResuMog actually improves it. Paste your resume (or start from scratch) and get a clean, ATS-friendly version in minutes. It rewrites bullet points, fixes formatting, highlights missing details, and shows what’s weak like having a recruiter review your resume instantly. Built for speed, clarity, and real job applications.

posts.name: Bored CV
posts.tagline: Your CV is boring. AI fixes it.
posts.description: Most CV builders are template-fillers — pick a layout, dump in fields, hope the ATS triggers. Bored CV flips it: drop your LinkedIn PDF + a job offer URL, and an AI coach interviews you, pulls forgotten achievements, writes the CV in real time around the actual offer (scraped from Lever, Greenhouse, Ashby APIs). Anti-buzzword by design — no "responsible for managing," no hallucinated metrics. WYSIWYG editor, 10 templates, FR/EN, free, no signup.

posts.name: PitchKit
posts.tagline: AI website mockups built for freelance devs who pitch
posts.description: Freelance devs lose pitches because clients can't visualize the redesign. Pitchkit turns any URL or Google Maps link into a personalized mockup in seconds, so every cold email, DM, or call lands with something tangible attached. Built by a freelancer for freelancers.

posts.name: Tryreplify
posts.tagline: AI replies to Google reviews in seconds
posts.description: Most local businesses ignore Google reviews — not because they don't care, but because writing a good reply takes time they don't have. Tryreplify fixes that. Paste the review, pick your tone and language, get a professional AI-generated reply in seconds. Copy and paste it to Google. Done. - Works in 30+ languages - Multiple tones: professional, friendly, formal - Reply history to track what you've answered - $15/month flat, 4,000 replies included - No free trial — just a tool that works

posts.tagline: AI workout tracker with intensity, volume & recovery insight
posts.description: Most workout apps just log your sets and reps. RepRise goes further it tracks your training programs, analyzes volume and intensity per muscle group, and monitors your recovery status so you know exactly when to push harder and when to rest. With built-in AI insights, RepRise helps you make smarter training decisions based on real data not guesswork. Whether you're optimizing for strength, hypertrophy, or overall performance, RepRise gives you the clarity to train with purpose.

posts.name: SensorCast
posts.tagline: Every phone sensor, streamed to your microcontroller

If so your apps lock at 4, and stay locked until you get there, or they stay locked until midnight. The app uses your location to track if your set routines are completed, in order to allow for scrolling.

posts.description: Recover lost passwords from ZIP, RAR, PDF, Office files and more. GPU-accelerated recovery, secure vault, and file locker — all in one free Windows app.

posts.name: TonuComponent
posts.tagline: Production-ready UI components and tools for frontend teams
posts.description: TonuComponent is a free library of 498 production-ready React and Tailwind components plus developer tools for building modern SaaS apps, dashboards, and interfaces faster. It includes animated UI blocks, 3D components, dashboards, forms, charts, and tools like JSON Formatter, Regex Tester, JWT Decoder, and generators—all designed for copy-paste workflows and fast product development.

posts.name: SENTINEL
posts.tagline: Bloomberg gives you data. Sentinel tells you what it means.
posts.description: Bloomberg is for institutions. Sentinel is for everyone else. Real-time geopolitical, economic, and corporate signals simplified into country-level market direction scores with confidence ratings and "So What" context. Live oil tanker map, Telegram alerts, Watchlist with live charts. Global intelligence, finally accessible. The world moves fast. Sanctions, conflicts, supply disruptions all of it moves markets before most people notice.

posts.name: OKAtlas
posts.tagline: AI chief of staff for leaders and executives
posts.description: OKAtlas watches your operation continuously across Slack, email, Jira, Salesforce, and more. It surfaces what needs your attention before you think to ask. Not a chatbot. Not a search tool. The intelligence layer that comes to you.

posts.name: SymGraph
posts.tagline: Building the Knowledge Layer for Binary Reverse Engineering
posts.description: The VirusTotal for reverse engineering intelligence. SymGraph is the shared intelligence platform behind GhidrAssist, BinAssist, and IDAssist plugins. It turns reverse engineering work into reusable knowledge: symbols, semantic graphs, analysis workflows, and tool-ready context that compounds instead of disappearing between sessions. It features a custom AI-enabled reverse engineering service.

posts.name: Pour
posts.tagline: One confident wine pick for whatever you're eating
posts.description: Pour scans your restaurant wine list a from photo and tells you exactly which wine to order for your dish. Not a list of peer reviewed options. One call, with a short reason why it works, what to avoid, and where the value is on the list. Built for people who feel uncertain when the wine list arrives. Free, no sign-up, works from your phone at the table.

posts.name: LeadVault
posts.tagline: Agentic AI platform for intent‑first, verified B2B leads
posts.description: LeadVault is an agentic AI system that finds real B2B demand, not cold contacts. It scans 3,000+ public platforms — LinkedIn, RFP boards, Upwork, Fiverr, Bark, government tenders — for companies that have already posted requirements. Every lead then passes through a 7‑layer AI + human verification pipeline: email validation, decision‑maker scoring, ICP matching, and budget/scope extraction. Output: CRM‑ready, 100% verified leads delivered in 48 hours.

posts.name: Mobile System Design
posts.tagline: Android interview prep. 13 chapters, 8 labs. Free. │
posts.description: Everything you need to clear Staff and Principal Android interviews, free. 13 deep-dive chapters, 31 real post-mortems (Snapchat, Instagram, Notion), 25 requirements-gathering problems, 26 behavioral scenarios, code review lab, mindset challenges, and spaced repetition.

posts.name: Tryreplify
posts.tagline: AI replies to Google reviews in seconds
posts.description: Most local businesses ignore Google reviews — not because they don't care, but because writing a good reply takes time they don't have. Tryreplify fixes that. Paste the review, pick your tone and language, get a professional AI-generated reply in seconds. Copy and paste it to Google. Done. - Works in 30+ languages - Multiple tones: professional, friendly, formal - Reply history to track what you've answered - $15/month flat, 4,000 replies included - No free trial — just a tool that works

posts.name: PitchKit
posts.tagline: AI website mockups built for freelance devs who pitch
posts.description: Freelance devs lose pitches because clients can't visualize the redesign. Pitchkit turns any URL or Google Maps link into a personalized mockup in seconds, so every cold email, DM, or call lands with something tangible attached. Built by a freelancer for freelancers.

posts.name: The Compute Desk
posts.tagline: AI compute diligence for GPU cloud decisions

posts.name: Trello Power-Up - PrimeScheduler

Open any card, write your comment, pick a time, hit Schedule. Done. - Schedule up to 7 days ahead - @mention teammates with autocomplete - Cancel anytime before it sends - First 5 comments free, no credit card needed - Pro: $4.99/month or $47.90/year

posts.name: Recbert AI
posts.tagline: BERT-based AI trained on millions of users' anime lists
posts.description: Recbert is a desktop app powered by BERT, an NLP architecture originally built to understand human language, now trained on massive real user data to understand human preferences. We collected 5 million user profiles from the three biggest anime platforms. A massive dataset with 5 million anime lists and hundreds of millions of ratings, filtered and structured into the largest and most up-to-date anime recommendation dataset. See what a model designed to read language does when it reads you.

posts.name: Atomic Focus
posts.tagline: Deep work sanctuary for ADHD & neurodivergent minds
posts.description: Most productivity tools are built for neurotypical brains. Atomic Focus is built for the rest of us. For ADHD, executive dysfunction, or anyone who struggles to start: 🧠 AI Task Slicer — Breaks overwhelming tasks into dopamine-friendly micro-steps ⏱️ Pomodoro Engine — 25-min focus sessions that work with your brain, not against it 🎧 Deep Focus Soundscapes — Ambient audio to regulate your nervous system Built by a developer who understands ADHD firsthand.

posts.name: BloClaw
posts.tagline: AI workspace for scientific discovery

No account required. No data collected. Nothing sent anywhere. Runs entirely in your browser, only on LinkedIn.

Works in the backcountry, during outages, and in every off-grid scenario.

Standard draft PLC-STD-001 submitted. Open for licensing.
